description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs: environment, test, and deploy. The environment job runs in the default stage and executes the shell commands: echo "instruksi untuk menginstall module yang dibutuhkan" and echo "instruksi untuk set-up environment variable". The test job runs only on the master branch (using an only rule) and runs: python manage.py test and echo "instruksi untuk test UI". The deploy job also runs only on the master branch and runs: echo "instruksi untuk migrasi data" and echo "instruksi untuk menjalankan aplikasi/services". No specific Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or variables are defined.
